entities: Prime FX; Primefx.org; Uduakobong Udo Inyangudo
reported_metric: CFTC alleged PrimeFX solicited U.S. and international customers for purported forex and Bitcoin trading beginning around June 2016
CFTC alleged customers could view balances and transactions on the PrimeFX website but the records did not reflect actual trades or profits
market_health_signal: Dashboard records needed external broker or exchange confirmation

reported_metric: CFTC complaint alleged zero-risk plans monthly returns above 27 percent and Bitcoin plans with daily profit claims
market_health_signal: Fixed high returns required realized-P&L and drawdown proof

reported_metric: CFTC complaint alleged PrimeFX claimed CySEC oversight and used a license number that did not belong to PrimeFX
market_health_signal: License claims needed direct regulator and entity-name verification

reported_metric: CFTC alleged emails directed customers to deposit funds into personal bank accounts of defendants and other agents
market_health_signal: Personal-account routing weakened custody and trading-activity claims

reported_metric: CFTC complaint said PrimeFX Managed System Ltd. was registered in the United Kingdom in September 2018
CFTC complaint said the U.K. company was dissolved in February 2020
market_health_signal: Corporate status needed current registry verification

reported_metric: CFTC announced a civil enforcement action alleging more than 1.2 million USD misappropriated from at least 106 customers
market_health_signal: Public enforcement challenged the trading and fund-use narrative

reported_metric: Court records show default final judgments against Daniell Liggins and Victor Edeh
market_health_signal: Liability findings converted part of the enforcement record into court remedies

reported_metric: Court records show default final judgment against Tochukwu Edeh
market_health_signal: Personal-account recipient records supported defendant-specific remedies

reported_metric: The court granted CFTC summary judgment against Charles Ochi and ordered 27945 USD restitution plus 83835 USD civil monetary penalty
market_health_signal: Ochi remedies tied traced receipts to restitution and deterrence
